How We Work Results About Get your free commercial audit
Electronic Distribution

Be bookable everywhere, without losing control of your rates.

Indi sets up and manages your distribution so you're visible on the channels that matter, connected cleanly to your systems, with a channel mix that balances cost and reach.

Get your free commercial audit
The problem

Distribution that grows by accident leaves revenue on the table.

For most independents, distribution grows by accident: a few listings, set up years ago, never optimised. Acquisition costs climb. Rates drift out of parity. Channels aren't talking to your PMS, so someone's updating availability by hand. And without a direct-booking strategy, you never build the guest relationship that lowers your cost per acquisition over time. The problem isn't the channels you're on. It's having no strategy for how you use them.

What Indi does

The actual work.

01

Channel strategy

The right mix of OTAs, direct and other channels for your property and market, not a scattergun of listings.

02

OTA setup & optimisation

Listings, content and the levers that affect how you rank and convert.

03

Clean connectivity

Channel manager, PMS and booking engine working together, so availability and rates move once and update everywhere.

04

Rate parity & integrity

Keeping your pricing consistent and your direct channel competitive.

05

New channel & GDS activation

Opening corporate and travel-trade demand when it’s right for you.

06

Ongoing channel management

Watching performance and shifting mix as demand changes.

How it's delivered

Built in onboarding. Run at the intensity you choose.

Your distribution strategy is built and implemented during onboarding, then kept running and optimised through your ongoing partnership, at the intensity you choose. Need a specific piece done on its own (a GDS activation, a channel manager / PMS setup)? We run those as standalone projects too.

See how we work
Proof

Evidence, honestly framed.

Client outcomes and testimonials for this capability are published on the Results page, never as a guaranteed result.

See client results
